hero.subheadline: AI-powered predictions for every Premier League match. Generated using Elo ratings, Poisson models and machine learning. Locked before kickoff.

cardsSection.unlockAll: Subscribe to view all Premier League predictions
cardsSection.fixturesEmpty: No upcoming fixtures in this window.

paragraphs: The Premier League is England's top football division, contested by 20 clubs across 38 matchdays from August to May. Founded in 1992, it has grown into the most-watched football league globally, generating broadcast revenue exceeding £10 billion per cycle. Our AI engine analyzes every Premier League match using current form, head-to-head history, expected goals, lineup data, and 40+ other variables.

Premier League predictions are particularly challenging due to the league's competitive depth. Top six clubs regularly face unpredictable challenges from mid-table sides, and end-of-season fixtures often involve significant motivation differences (top four race vs relegation battle). Our model weighs recent form heavily — particularly the last 6-10 matches — combined with home/away splits, where Premier League home advantage is historically among the strongest in European football.

Every Premier League prediction is locked with a public timestamp before kickoff. Wins and losses both go into our public track record. Free users see 2-3 Premier League predictions daily; subscribers receive every match across the league with full statistical analysis: xG, possession, lineup strength, and tactical context.

methodology.h2: How Premier League Predictions Are Made
methodology.body: Premier League predictions use the same engine as all our football predictions: Elo ratings for team strength, Poisson models for goal probability, and machine learning for pattern recognition. The model is trained on historical Premier League data — over a decade of match results, lineups and form data — and updated continuously as each match concludes.

pillars.label: Machine learning trained on Premier League data

questions.q: How accurate are AI predictions for the Premier League?
questions.a: Accuracy varies per matchday and prediction type. We publish every Premier League prediction in our public track record so you can verify performance yourself.

questions.q: Why do you offer free Premier League predictions?
questions.a: The Premier League is one of three top leagues where we publish 2-3 free predictions daily. Subscribers receive every Premier League match with full analysis.

questions.q: What types of predictions do you publish for the Premier League?
questions.a: For every Premier League match we publish predictions across multiple markets: 1X2 (match result), Over/Under goals, Both Teams to Score, and Double Chance.

questions.q: How early are Premier League predictions available?
questions.a: Subscribers see Premier League predictions up to 24 hours before kickoff. Free users see them 2 hours before kickoff.

questions.q: Do you cover FA Cup and European fixtures involving Premier League clubs?
questions.a: We cover all Premier League matches. FA Cup, Champions League and Europa League fixtures involving Premier League clubs are covered separately under their own competition pages.

questions.q: Can I get Premier League predictions via Telegram?
questions.a: Yes. Paid subscribers receive Telegram notifications for high-confidence Premier League predictions.

finalCta.bodyFree: Free users see 2-3 daily picks. Subscribers get every match with full statistical analysis.
finalCta.bodyGated: Premier League predictions are part of all paid plans.
